name: Rudy Yakym
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $356,500 for Rudy Yakym in U.S. House, IN-02. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
